sections.section_purpose: To describe the technical approach to meet the requirements.
sections.response_guidance: Describe how the technical approach will operate within the defined technical environment and meet service attributes and application requirements.

sections.section_purpose: To outline the security framework and compliance obligations.
sections.response_guidance: Describe compliance with security obligations, including probity, conflict of interest, and Defence policies and standards.

sections.section_purpose: To detail the project management and governance structure.
sections.response_guidance: Describe participation in meetings and compliance with governance frameworks.

sections.section_purpose: To describe the service delivery and management framework.
sections.response_guidance: Explain how services will be delivered aligned to milestones, acceptance criteria, and support testing activities.

sections.section_purpose: To identify key personnel involved in service delivery.
sections.response_guidance: List personnel required to deliver services and any stand-down conditions.

sections.section_purpose: To provide a detailed pricing schedule.
sections.response_guidance: Provide pricing in accordance with the SOW pricing structure and comply with Work Order pricing arrangements.

sections.section_purpose: To address commercial terms and conditions.
sections.response_guidance: State compliance with IP provisions defined in the SOW.
